where.if: AND (1=0 OR u.ui_nm ILIKE '%' || #{searchValue} || '%' OR u.ui_cd ILIKE '%' || #{searchValue} || '%' )

if.test: dateStart != null and dateStart != '' and dateEnd != null and dateEnd != '' and dateType != null and dateType != ''

choose.when: AND u.reg_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND u.reg_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')
AND u.upd_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND u.upd_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.ec.dp :: DpUi :: selectById */ u.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm FROM dp_ui u LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = u.site_id WHERE u.ui_id = #{id}

SELECT /* base.ec.dp :: DpUi :: selectList */ u.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm FROM dp_ui u LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = u.site_id
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT /* base.ec.dp :: DpUi :: selectPageList */ u.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm FROM dp_ui u LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = u.site_id
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(u.*) /* base.ec.dp :: DpUi :: selectPageCount */ FROM dp_ui u
